info.title: uxwVend API
info.description: Auto-generated API surface for uxwVend. Core endpoints are hand-curated; module endpoints are derived from each installed module's `module.json` manifest.

post.description: Authenticate a user with email/username and password; returns a session cookie and enforces 2FA when enabled.
Create a new user account with email, username and password; validates input with Zod and hashes credentials with bcrypt.
Initiate password recovery by emailing a time-limited reset token to the account on file.
Consume a password reset token and set a new password for the associated user.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile, including display fields and preferences.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's own profile fields (name, bio, avatar, preferences).

get.description: Return a paginated list of users with their roles; requires admin permissions.
Fetch a single user's full record by ID, including role and profile data.

patch.description: Update a user's fields (role, status, profile) as an administrator.

delete.description: Permanently delete a user account and its owned records; admin-only.

get.description: Return all roles defined in the platform along with their priority and permission assignments.

post.description: Create a new RBAC role with a name, priority and initial permission set.

get.description: Return all installed modules with their manifest metadata and enabled state.

patch.description: Toggle a module's enabled state at runtime without uninstalling its files.

post.description: Download, extract and register a verified marketplace module, then regenerate the module registry and merged Prisma schema.

get.description: Return all platform settings (site metadata, branding, navigation, feature flags) for admin editing.

patch.description: Upsert one or more platform setting key/value pairs and invalidate the public settings cache.

get.description: Return the subset of settings safe for unauthenticated clients (site name, logo, hero config, etc.).

post.description: Accept a multipart file upload, validate its size and MIME type, persist it to media storage and return its public URL.

get.description: Return a paginated list of media library assets uploaded to the platform.

get.summary: Global search across enabled module search providers
get.description: Run a federated search query against every enabled module that registers a search provider and return merged results.
Return all issued API keys with metadata (name, scopes, last used) but never the raw secret.

post.description: Generate a new API key with scoped permissions; the raw secret is returned exactly once in the response.

get.description: Liveness and readiness probe that verifies database connectivity and returns service health.
Return in-memory request metrics (per-route counts, latency buckets, error rates) for the admin dashboard.
Return detailed system information including Node version, memory usage, uptime and environment details.
Return all database backup archives currently stored on disk with their size and creation timestamp.

post.description: Trigger a new database backup dump and write the archive to the backups directory.

get.description: Aggregate statistics for the admin dashboard combining core counters and registered module statsApi contributions.
